message:
feat(agent): implement parser core logic (bd-2bsmx)

Implement the core parser that transforms terminal output into structured
AgentState objects. Key features:

- Parse() method extracts agent type, metrics, and state flags
- DetectAgentType() identifies cc/cod/gmi from output patterns
- Metric extraction: context percentage (Codex), tokens, memory (Gemini)
- State flag detection: working, idle, rate limited, error states
- Confidence scoring based on indicator quality and count
- ANSI code stripping for clean pattern matching
- Configurable thresholds via ParserConfig

40 tests pass covering real-world scenarios and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
